titleStmt.title: SII 31.96: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 96. (A.R. No. B 244 of 1938.) KŌḌŪRU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the tombs situated to the south of the village.
This inscription is dated Śaka 1470, Kīlaka, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 11, corresponding to August 30, Tuesday, 1548 A.D.

Regsiters the gift of market duties pēmṭa-sumka of the village Aṁḍirājakōḍūru for the maintenance of the festivals on dasami, one mānika of rice for the mid-day offerings (pagaṭipūṭa avasaramu) on everyday and for the festivals of Śrīrāmanavami, Śrījayanti and Saṁkrānti to the god Chennakēśava in the village by the mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Pasupula Timmayadēva mahārāju for the merit of Ramgarāju. The village Amdirājukōḍūru is situated in Ghanḍi-kōṭa-sīma, the amaranāyaṁkara of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandēla Timmayadēva mahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī
jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1470 Agunēṭi kīlakasaṁvatsara
śrāvaṇabā1lu śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpaśrī
vīrasadāsi(śi)vadēva mahārāyalu vidyā
nagaramaṁdu pṛdhivī sāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagā
nuśrīmaṁnnahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdēla timmayadēva
mahārājaluṁgāriki Amaranāyāṁkarānu pā
liṁcanavadhariṁcana ghaṁḍikōṭa sīmalōni Akaṭi
rāju kōḍūranu dēvadēvōttamulaina Akhilāṁ
ḍakōṭi brahmāṁḍanāyakulaina kōḍūri
cannakēśavamū¨rttidēvu śrīpādapadaṁbu
laku śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara pasavulatimma
yadēva mahārājuluṁgāru Anaṁtulu
AIna daṁḍamulu sama¨rppiṁci Icina
dha¨rmma śāsanakrama meṭlannanu Aṁdirā
jukoḍūri grāmamu peṁṭasuṁkhamu
daśami mahōtsavālakuṁnu dinaṁ 1
ki pagaṭi Avasaraṁ māneṁḍu bi
yyaṁ lekha Āragiṁpulakunu śrījayaṁ
ti rāmanavami saṁkrāṁti Ivimōdalai
namahotsavālaku raṁgarājuṁgāriki pu
ṁṇyaṁgānu sama¨rpistimi . Idha¨rmmānaku
yavaru tappanānu tamamātapitāḷla
nu vāraṇāsilōnu vadhiIṁcina pāpāna
bōvu vāru . gaṁgalōnu gōvubrāhmanni
caṁpina pāpānaṁbōvu vāru . dāna
pālanayōrmadhye dānācchrēyō
nu pālanaṁ dānātyva¨rgga mavā
pnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 31.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
